messages.content:
Centering servo on pin 3 to 90 degrees.

<tool_call>
{"name": "call_service", "arguments": {"service": "/dexi/servo_control", "service_type": "dexi_interfaces/srv/ServoControl", "args": {"pin": 3, "angle": 90}}}
</tool_call>

function.name: get_topics
function.description: List all available ROS 2 topics and their message types.

function.name: subscribe_once
function.description: Subscribe to a topic and return the first message received. Useful for reading sensor data, detections, or drone state.

topic.description: The topic name, e.g. '/fmu/out/battery_status'

function.description: Call a ROS 2 service and return the response. Use this for drone commands and LED control.

messages.content:
Starting offboard control and taking off to 1 meter.

<tool_call>
{"name": "call_service", "arguments": {"service": "/dexi/execute_blockly_command", "service_type": "dexi_interfaces/srv/ExecuteBlocklyCommand", "args": {"command": "arm", "parameter": 0.0, "timeout": 10.0}}}
</tool_call>
<tool_call>
{"name": "call_service", "arguments": {"service": "/dexi/execute_blockly_command", "service_type": "dexi_interfaces/srv/ExecuteBlocklyCommand", "args": {"command": "offboard_takeoff", "parameter": 1.0, "timeout": 15.0}}}
</tool_call>

messages.content: What's the current weather condition out there?
I don't have access to weather data. I can only interact with the drone's sensors and controls. I can check the battery, altitude, position, or camera detections if you'd like.

messages.content:
Arm, and take off to 2 meters.

<tool_call>
{"name": "call_service", "arguments": {"service": "/dexi/execute_blockly_command", "service_type": "dexi_interfaces/srv/ExecuteBlocklyCommand", "args": {"command": "arm", "parameter": 0.0, "timeout": 10.0}}}
</tool_call>
<tool_call>
{"name": "call_service", "arguments": {"service": "/dexi/execute_blockly_command", "service_type": "dexi_interfaces/srv/ExecuteBlocklyCommand", "args": {"command": "offboard_takeoff", "parameter": 2.0, "timeout": 15.0}}}
</tool_call>

function.description: List all available ROS 2 topics and their message types.

function.name: subscribe_once
function.description: Subscribe to a topic and return the first message received. Useful for reading sensor data, detections, or drone state.

topic.description: The topic name, e.g. '/fmu/out/battery_status'

function.name: call_service
function.description: Call a ROS 2 service and return the response. Use this for drone commands and LED control.

function.name: publish_message
function.description: Publish a single message to a ROS 2 topic.

topic.description: The topic name to publish to.

messages.content:
Arm, and take off to 2 meters.

<tool_call>
{"name": "call_service", "arguments": {"service": "/dexi/execute_blockly_command", "service_type": "dexi_interfaces/srv/ExecuteBlocklyCommand", "args": {"command": "arm", "parameter": 0.0, "timeout": 10.0}}}
</tool_call>
<tool_call>
{"name": "call_service", "arguments": {"service": "/dexi/execute_blockly_command", "service_type": "dexi_interfaces/srv/ExecuteBlocklyCommand", "args": {"command": "offboard_takeoff", "parameter": 2.0, "timeout": 15.0}}}
</tool_call>

messages.content:
Arm the drone, and take off to the default altitude of 1.5 meters.

<tool_call>
{"name": "call_service", "arguments": {"service": "/dexi/execute_blockly_command", "service_type": "dexi_interfaces/srv/ExecuteBlocklyCommand", "args": {"command": "arm", "parameter": 0.0, "timeout": 10.0}}}
</tool_call>
<tool_call>
{"name": "call_service", "arguments": {"service": "/dexi/execute_blockly_command", "service_type": "dexi_interfaces/srv/ExecuteBlocklyCommand", "args": {"command": "offboard_takeoff", "parameter": 1.5, "timeout": 15.0}}}
</tool_call>

topic.description: The topic name to publish to.

function.name: get_topics
function.description: List all available ROS 2 topics and their message types.

function.name: subscribe_once
function.description: Subscribe to a topic and return the first message received. Useful for reading sensor data, detections, or drone state.

topic.description: The topic name, e.g. '/fmu/out/battery_status'

function.name: call_service
function.description: Call a ROS 2 service and return the response. Use this for drone commands and LED control.

function.name: publish_message
function.description: Publish a single message to a ROS 2 topic.

topic.description: The topic name to publish to.
